scope_boundary: Artifact Graph receipt repository audit/challenge only. The audit accepts four selected repository receipt surfaces, checks 55 tracked artifact digests plus external Circle receipt fingerprints, and rejects five mutation controls; the deterministic challenge accepts three tracked-digest responses and one Circle external fingerprint response while rejecting five challenge controls. This is not a deployed artifact graph, not a deployed attestation service, not deployed audit behavior, not open-world receipt faithfulness, not verifier-correctness evidence, not external-project truth, and not an upward support-state transition.
transition_reason: The receipt repository audit/challenge is useful because it moves the record-reality lane from synthetic receipt shape toward current repository evidence: selected receipts must still name existing artifacts, match tracked digests, preserve command-pass or external-fingerprint evidence, keep non-claims, and answer a deterministic digest/fingerprint challenge. The evidence remains bounded to local repository records and one imported Circle fingerprint surface, so this accepted decision blocks promotion for deployed artifact-graph behavior, deployed attestation, deployed audit durability, open-world receipt faithfulness, verifier correctness, external project truth, benchmark performance, model quality, safety, ASI, or the Artifact Graphs chapter core claim.
required_artifacts: deployed or externally reviewable artifact-graph receipt trace
independent observation route outside the producing component
challenge source or verifier outside this repository
public-safe produced artifact with parent job, source/context set, context transaction, semantic certificate, replay declaration, residual declaration, evidence gate, and claim/test link
deployed or externally reviewable audit durability evidence
source-interpretation adequacy review where source-derived claims are involved
accepted evidence-transition record for any narrowed upward support movement
negative_results: support promotion from receipt shape is rejected
support promotion from challenge shape is rejected
repository audit/challenge evidence remains bounded to local repository records
no chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: missing artifact, stale digest, failed command, missing non-claim, fingerprint mismatch, or support-promotion control accepted as valid
